name: recoil_app_start_engine
description: RecoilApp::StartEngine runs the engine bootstrap, reports turret reset status, initializes sound/video/input/HUD startup state, and returns success or failure.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /DUINT_PTR=UINT /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?StartEngine@RecoilApp@@QAEHI@Z at 0x42e220 still fails: 129 unmasked mismatches, 96 relocation bytes masked, 12 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 261 bytes, VC object symbol size 272 bytes.

Reviewed difference is source-shape drift around imported calls and provider-bound startup paths: the original emits imported printf/MessageBox calls and a specific inline strcpy block, while current source is functionally equivalent C++ and relies on accepted direct callee smokes. A full live StartEngine smoke remains provider-bound because success reaches DirectDraw/DirectSound/HUD startup and failure shows the process message box.
